title: paspalanthium stoloniferum
intro: Paspalanthium stoloniferum, also known as Paspalum stoloniferum, is a type of plant that belongs to the grass family and is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Paspalum stoloniferum include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat skin conditions such as wounds and infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams, although its availability and use may vary due to its limited distribution and potential toxicity.
